OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Don DeFraga is present.
Attorney David Foran appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Peggy Von Radic is present.
Attorney Amber Lin representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
